scripts.deploy:plugin: pnpm run build:plugin && mkdir -p vault/.obsidian/plugins/github-sync-bridge && cp plugin/main.js plugin/manifest.json vault/.obsidian/plugins/github-sync-bridge/
scripts.deploy:plugin:sync: pnpm run deploy:plugin && pnpm exec ob sync-config --path ./vault --configs community-plugin,community-plugin-data && pnpm exec ob sync --path ./vault
